view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement 'Enroll once, attend multiple sessions' is satisfied as evidenced by the successful enrollment and attendance tracking.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement 'Enroll once, attend multiple sessions' is satisfied as evidenced by the successful enrollment and attendance tracking.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement by demonstrating that Sarah enrolled in the program and attended multiple sessions. The evidence shows that she attended 11 out of 12 sessions and was marked as 'Complete' upon fulfilling the graduation criteria. This directly supports the requirement that a user can enroll once and attend multiple sessions, confirming the system's functionality in this regard.
